description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with a vibrant red exterior and metallic gray sides, featuring two wide slots at the top for toasting bread. The front and back panels are smooth and glossy, with the front side displaying a control panel that includes a lever, a large round knob, and several buttons for adjusting settings. The toaster is loaded with two slices of white bread, visible from the top and side views. The metallic side panels curve gently, giving the appliance a modern, sleek appearance. The base is black and flat, providing stability on countertops or other surfaces. No visible brand logo or power cord is present, and the crumb tray is not apparent from any angle.
description: A modern red and metallic toaster with two bread slots, a control panel with buttons and a knob, and a sleek, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red panel and two slices of bread inserted into the slots.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metallic gray surface and the thickness of the bread slices in the slots.
description_view_2: Back view with a plain red panel and the tops of the bread slices visible.
description_view_3: Control panel view showing the lever, round knob, and buttons on the metallic gray surface, with both bread slots visible.
attribute_control_knobs: One large round metallic knob on the lower right of the control panel, with no visible markings or labels.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots on the top, evenly spaced and sized to fit standard bread slices.
